response_text:
ENTITY Airport
PK code
ATTR code : varchar : PK
ATTR name : varchar

ENTITY City
PK code
ATTR code : varchar : PK
ATTR name : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK code
ATTR code : varchar : PK
ATTR name : varchar

ENTITY Aircraft
PK registration
ATTR registration : varchar : PK
ATTR model : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_number
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_code : varchar : FK
ATTR departure_date : date
ATTR departure_time : time
ATTR arrival_date : date
ATTR arrival_time : time
ATTR status : varchar

ENTITY FlightLeg
PK flight_number, departure_date, departure_time
ATTR flight_number : varchar : FK
ATTR departure_date : date : FK
ATTR departure_time : time : FK
ATTR arrival_date : date
ATTR arrival_time : time
ATTR status : varchar
ATTR departure_airport_code : varchar : FK
ATTR arrival_airport_code : varchar : FK

ENTITY Passenger
PK passenger_id
ATTR passenger_id : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar
ATTR crew_role : varchar

ENTITY CrewAssignment
PK flight_number, passenger_id, departure_date, departure_time
ATTR flight_number : varchar : FK
ATTR passenger_id : varchar : FK
ATTR departure_date : date : FK
ATTR departure_time : time : FK
ATTR role : varchar

REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_code
REL FlightLeg -> Flight : 1 -> 1 : FK=flight_number
REL FlightLeg -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=departure_airport_code
REL FlightLeg -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=arrival_airport_code
REL CrewAssignment -> FlightLeg : 1 -> 1 : FK=flight_number, departure_date, departure_time
REL CrewAssignment -> Passenger : 1 -> 1 : FK=passenger_id
